_comment: F-69-07 floor-reproduction fixture for Microsoft Teams. Minimal hand-authored *dissect.DissectResult modeling ONLY scorer-read fields. NOT a full DissectResult mirror. Authored so storage=0 and behavior=10 reproduce the F-69-07 floor through the live scorer Score() path. webview2_info is present (so behavior legacy scenarios==1 -> 10*1=10) but its profiles list is intentionally EMPTY so the storage scorer stays at 0 (len(profiles)>0 is false). cert_info absent so the 85 spec-refresh floor never engages. msix_info carries no capabilities/urls/ui-hint files so scoreBehaviorUWP stays <=10. package_name differs from rescan pkgId 'MSTeams_8wekyb3d8bbwe' (H4/A2 substrate).
